Meaning.En: in or to a higher place or position; higher than something else
Meaning.Example: She hung the painting above the fireplace.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả vị trí vật đặt cao hơn vật khác.
Situation.En: Describing a physical position where one object is higher than another.

Meaning.En: at or to a higher place or level
Meaning.Example: Please read the instructions above before starting.

Situation.Vi: Dẫn dắt người đọc đến thông tin đã nêu trước đó trong văn bản.
Situation.En: Referring to information previously mentioned in a text.

Meaning.En: mentioned or referred to previously in a document or conversation
Meaning.Example: The above points summarize the main arguments.

Situation.Vi: Dùng trong văn viết để chỉ các nội dung đã nêu trước đó.
Situation.En: Used in writing to refer to points or details already stated.
